seo.description: Muhammad Latif Harkat is a Senior Full Stack Developer and IT Project Manager building scalable web platforms, automation systems, and high-performance infrastructure.
seo.socialDescription: Scalable platforms, reliable infrastructure, and automation systems engineered end to end.

hero.description: I engineer scalable digital products from interface to infrastructure — combining rigorous architecture, high-performance backends, automation, and technical leadership.

about.title: Built for the whole system.
about.intro: I am a Full Stack Developer with more than five years of experience designing and delivering scalable software across the frontend, backend, cloud, automation, and distributed systems.
about.description: My work spans large-scale web products, enterprise systems, high-performance APIs, real-time operations, infrastructure, and data-heavy workflows. I translate ambiguous business goals into dependable technical systems, then guide teams through architecture, implementation, deployment, and continuous improvement.

capabilities.title: Architecture & Scale
capabilities.description: Distributed services, clean boundaries, resilient data flows, and systems designed for growth.

capabilities.title: Performance Engineering
capabilities.description: Profiling, caching, query optimization, concurrency, and fast backend services.

capabilities.title: Automation & Operations
capabilities.description: Browser, ADB, scraping, task orchestration, workers, and reliable processing pipelines.

capabilities.title: Technical Leadership
capabilities.description: Project planning, architecture decisions, reviews, agile delivery, and team alignment.

projects.title: Anime Streaming Platform
projects.description: A modern streaming experience with a scalable backend, search-focused discovery, technical SEO, responsive playback surfaces, and globally optimized content delivery.

projects.title: MutasiOPS
projects.description: Enterprise financial mutation automation connected to multiple Android devices, built for high concurrency, real-time monitoring, reliable workflows, and efficient transaction processing.

projects.title: WebDok
projects.description: Digital bookkeeping and business management software with transaction workflows, financial reporting, user administration, operational analytics, and decision-ready dashboards.

projects.title: Automation & Security Tools
projects.description: A practical toolkit for infrastructure management: automation utilities, monitoring software, internal security research tools, OSINT workflows, and productivity systems.

services.title: Product Engineering
services.description: Full-stack web products, enterprise applications, and interfaces built for real workflows.

services.title: Backend & APIs
services.description: High-performance services, REST APIs, integrations, queues, and real-time systems.

services.title: System Architecture
services.description: Technical discovery, domain modeling, database design, and scalable architecture.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Deployment, CI/CD, Linux infrastructure, observability, and performance tuning.

services.title: Automation
services.description: Web scraping, bots, browser automation, ADB orchestration, and task processing.

services.title: Optimization
services.description: Database profiling, caching strategy, bottleneck removal, and reliability upgrades.

services.title: Minecraft Systems
services.description: Server development, plugins, infrastructure, gameplay systems, and optimization.

services.title: Technical Consulting
services.description: Architecture review, delivery planning, code review, and engineering leadership.

contact.title: Have a hard problem?
contact.description: Available for freelance, contract, remote, hybrid, and full-time opportunities. Tell me what you are building, what is blocking it, and what success needs to look like.
